name: Chainlink Convergence
angle: SENTINEL as a Chainlink Functions-powered truth verification agent. On-chain fact attestation using oracle feeds. Perfect native fit.
notes: Mar 8 deadline. AI agents track = direct SENTINEL fit. Chainlink oracles are core to truth layer architecture.

name: PL Genesis (Protocol Labs Frontiers)
angle: TRUTHBOUND IV as privacy-preserving AI truth layer. Governance + verifiability = perfect PL narrative. Top teams get Founders Forge (seed funding).
notes: Hacking ends Mar 16. Top finalists get Founders Forge accelerator invite with real VC. Highest long-term upside of all events.

name: Monolith + Seeker (Solana Mobile)
prize_note: $125k+ total, mobile dApps for Seeker device
angle: SENTINEL mobile companion app -- privacy-first truth agent on the Seeker device. Solana Mobile SDK + on-chain verification.
notes: Mar 9. Solana Mobile/RadiantsDAO. Mobile-native SENTINEL build -- can reuse core agent logic with React Native / Solana Mobile SDK wrapper.

name: AI Trading Agents with ERC-8004
angle: SENTINEL as a trustless AI financial verification agent using ERC-8004 standard. Truth layer for on-chain agent actions -- prevents hallucinated trades.
notes: Starts Mar 9, ends Mar 22 (lablab.ai). Trustless AI financial agents = direct SENTINEL use case. Register by Mar 9.

name: Starknet Re{define} (Bitcoin & Privacy)
angle: SENTINEL truth layer on Starknet using Cairo + ZK proofs for privacy-preserving verification. Bitcoin settlement layer tie-in via Starknet Bitcoin bridge.
notes: Extended to Mar 10. Solstice fallback Mar 22. Bitcoin + Privacy = strong TRUTHBOUND theme. ZK truth proofs are the angle.

name: StableHacks 2026 (Solana)
angle: Truth-verified stablecoin oracle feed using SENTINEL. Weak fit but huge prize pool. Only pursue if Chainlink/PL bandwidth allows.
notes: Starts Mar 13, ends Mar 22. Lower theme fit but massive prize. Institutional stablecoins -- SENTINEL oracle verification angle is a stretch.

name: Avalanche Retro9000 / InfraBUIDL
prize_note: Retroactive grant, amount TBD based on activity
angle: Deploy SENTINEL truth layer on Avalanche C-Chain. Retro9000 rewards usage -- deploy early, generate transactions before Mar 18 snapshot.
notes: Mar 18 snapshot. Retroactive -- must have on-chain activity BEFORE snapshot. Deploy ASAP to qualify. Infra BUILD / Lybra BUILD(AZ) tracks.

name: Polkadot Solidity Hackathon
angle: SENTINEL as a cross-chain truth oracle using Polkadot's interoperability. Solidity contracts on Moonbeam/AssetHub.
notes: Mar 20. Polkadot * feb 15 from whiteboard may reference a past phase. Lower priority but decent prize. Pursue if bandwidth allows after must-dos.

name: Pacifica
angle: SENTINEL core build. Details unclear -- confirm tracks before investing time.
notes: Mid-March (~Mar 15). Listed on whiteboard as 'Pacifica'. Low prize, need to verify event details before prioritizing.

name: MEZO Hackathon (Bitcoin's Future)
angle: SENTINEL truth agent on MEZO -- Bitcoin-native verification layer. Privacy + Bitcoin = core TRUTHBOUND narrative.
notes: Starts Apr 13. April 1 was likely the registration/interest date from whiteboard. Good Bitcoin + privacy fit. Plan SENTINEL for Bitcoin deployment.

name: Liquify Indexer API
angle: Build a truth-verified data indexer using SENTINEL + Liquify API. Moderate fit but large ongoing prize pool.
notes: Rolling Q1-Q2. Low urgency but high total pool. Track for when bandwidth opens in May. 'Liquify -- may' from whiteboard confirms May focus.

name: MIT Bitcoin Expo Hackathon
angle: SENTINEL as Bitcoin-native truth layer. MIT prestige + Bitcoin community = long-term network value even without cash prize.
notes: ~Apr 10-12. Prestige over cash. Good for network building and MEZO/Bitcoin narrative consistency.

name: Brinc FAIR Data Web3 Accelerator
angle: TRUTHBOUND IV as FAIR data verification platform. Privacy + truth + Web3 data = strong narrative fit for Brinc.
notes: Open now, rolling. Accelerator format = VC pathway. Apply after core prototype is ready (post Mar 16 PL Genesis push).

name: Base Ecosystem Builders
angle: Deploy SENTINEL on Base. Ongoing ecosystem grants for active builders. 'Base 003 3/3' from whiteboard = Base round 3.
notes: Rolling. Deploy SENTINEL on Base as part of multi-chain strategy. Apply when prototype is production-ready.

name: Polygon Community Grants
angle: SENTINEL deployment on Polygon. Lower priority -- pursue opportunistically.
notes: Rolling. Low urgency. Include as part of multi-chain deployment plan but not a primary focus.

name: Cortensor (Monthly Bounty)
angle: SENTINEL inference on Cortensor decentralized compute. Small ongoing upside.
notes: Rolling monthly. Small prize but consistent. Low effort once SENTINEL is deployed. Background task.

name: Higgsfield Action Contest
angle: Watch for new rounds -- Higgsfield 26/2 from whiteboard was Feb 26 deadline.
notes: Closed Feb 28. Monitor Higgsfield for next contest round. Lower theme fit anyway.

name: Legion | Simplicity Accelerator
angle: Missed Mar 3 deadline. Watch for next cohort -- Stacks + Simplicity = Bitcoin scripting fit for TRUTHBOUND.
notes: Legion|Simplicity 3/3 from whiteboard. Deadline was Mar 3 -- check if late applications accepted. Otherwise track for next cycle.

name: Arb Mentorship / Blok Capital
angle: TRUTHBOUND IV pitch to Blok Capital. Arb Mentorship for technical guidance. Network value over immediate cash.
notes: Whiteboard item. Rolling. Good for network + VC intro. Pursue after core hackathon sprint (post Mar 22).

name: Token (slone) 8/3
angle: Whiteboard item -- 'Token (slone) 8/3'. Likely a token-focused hackathon with Mar 8 deadline. Verify details.
notes: From whiteboard: 'Token (slone) 8/3'. Same deadline as Chainlink Convergence. Clarify if this is a separate event or a track within another event.
